name: Weekly KPI Digest (Auto-Send)
description: Pulls data from client's tools every week, compiles into a formatted report, emails it to stakeholders automatically.

kpi_targets.description: Define target values for each KPI to show red/green status

client_variables.report_format: HTML email with charts or PDF attachment
client_variables.ai_insight_prompt: Analyze this week's KPIs vs last week. Highlight wins, concerns, and one action item.

setup_steps: Identify all data sources and KPIs with client
Set up Google Sheets or Airtable as data aggregation layer
Connect each data source to the aggregation sheet
Design report email template (HTML) with client branding
Build n8n workflow: Schedule → Pull data → AI analyze → Format → Send
Configure OpenAI prompt for weekly insights generation
Set up target thresholds for red/yellow/green indicators
Test with one week of real data
Get client approval on format and launch
n8n_workflow_nodes: Google Sheets - Pull this week's data
Google Sheets - Pull last week's data for comparison
OpenAI - Generate insights and action items
Code - Build HTML report with KPIs and insights
Google Sheets - Log report sent (audit trail)
kpis_to_track: Data freshness (hours since last source update)
